'''''TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire: Official Secrets & Solutions''''' was a strategy guide published by [[Prima Games|Prima's Secrets of the Games]] for the [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire|''Defender of the Empire'']] add-on for [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']].

{{Book-stub}}
